rationale: The exact official MTA Q25 row establishes a realized June 29, 2025 service-change date, the uniquely pinned current Q25 route, and two bounded treatment members: stop removal on the continuing route and discontinuation of the Limited service pattern. The reviewed v1-rc6 anchor treats the historical Limited pattern as lifecycle-compatible evidence on the current Q25 identity; it does not create a second Limited route identity. Full-list, detail, and timetable language remains navigation context. Only the current Q25 route receives an affects_route relation; the official Queens Bus Network Redesign project context can later support route_redesign as the reviewed bundle analysis family.

clauses.label: Q25 stop removals
clauses.source_quote: The Q25 will keep its current routing, but some stops have been removed.
clauses.description: Q25 retained its current routing while some stops were removed.

clauses.source_quote: View the full list of stops.

clauses.label: Q25 Limited discontinuation
clauses.source_quote: The Q25 Limited will be discontinued.
clauses.description: The Q25 Limited service pattern was discontinued.

clauses.source_quote: Get more details on Q25 service.
